2604.12666.title: From Imitation to Discrimination: Progressive Curriculum Learning for Robust Web Navigation
2604.12666.paper_summary: Text-based web agents offer computational efficiency for autonomous web navigation, yet developing robust agents remains challenging due to the noisy and heterogeneous nature of real-world HTML. Standard Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) approaches fail in two critical dimensions: they lack discrimination capabilities to reject plausible but incorrect elements in densely populated pages, and exhibit limited generalization to unseen website layouts. To address these challenges, we introduce the Triton dataset (590k instances) and a progressive training curriculum. Triton is constructed via Structural-Semantic Hard Negative Mining, which explicitly mines topologically similar distractors, and a Dual-Agent Consensus pipeline that synthesizes diverse cross-domain tasks with strict verification. Building upon this foundation, our progressive curriculum produces three models: Triton-SFT-32B for basic imitation, Triton-ORPO-32B for robust discrimination via Odds Ratio Preference Optimization, and Triton-GRPO-32B for long-horizon consistency through Group Relative Policy Optimization. Empirical evaluation on Mind2Web demonstrates that Triton-GRPO-32B achieves state-of-the-art performance among open-source models with 58.7% Step Success Rate, surpassing GPT-4.5 (42.4%) and Claude-4.5 (41.4%) by over 16%, validating that specialized data curriculum outweighs raw parameter scale for web navigation.
2604.12666.paper_summary_zh: 文本基礎的網路代理提供了自主網路導航的計算效率，然而，由於現實世界 HTML 的噪聲和異質性，開發穩健的代理仍然具有挑戰性。標準的監督微調 (SFT) 方法在兩個關鍵維度上失敗：它們缺乏拒絕密集頁面中合理但不正確元素的辨別能力，並且對未見過的網站佈局的泛化能力有限。為了解決這些挑戰，我們引入了 Triton 數據集（590k 實例）和漸進式訓練課程。Triton 是通過結構-語義困難負樣本挖掘構建的，該方法明確挖掘拓撲相似的干擾項，以及一個雙代理共識管道，該管道合成多樣的跨領域任務並進行嚴格驗證。在此基礎上，我們的漸進課程產生了三個模型：Triton-SFT-32B 用於基本模仿，Triton-ORPO-32B 通過機率比偏好優化實現穩健的辨別，以及 Triton-GRPO-32B 通過群體相對策略優化實現長期一致性。在 Mind2Web 上的實證評估顯示，Triton-GRPO-32B 在開源模型中達到了最先進的性能，步驟成功率為 58.7%，超過了 GPT-4.5（42.4%）和 Claude-4.5（41.4%）超過 16%，驗證了專門數據課程在網路導航中優於原始參數規模。
2604.12666.author: Chuang Peng et.al.
2604.12666.authors: Chuang Peng, Wei Zhang, Renshuai Tao, Xinhao Zhang, Jian Yang
